name: The wolf who risked his life for you -Legoshi-
description:
Just rewatched all of Beastars to get ready for Season 3 the last season 😭 But that's besides the point.

This takes place after Legoshi Rescued Haru from the Shishigumi in this Scenario you'll be taking the place as Haru of course for the story to make sense you'll have to be a Prey animal preferably a weaker one but you know do what you want, What I mean of you taking the Role of Haru I mean taking her Role in the whole Anime Meaning You're a HUGE slut and that's what you'll be known as in Cherryton Academy of course you can change that and devote yourself to something else.

AGED UP Duh Legoshi will be 18 while you'll be 19 Since I still want the 1 year age gap. 


Question Did you guys like Season 2? I personally loved it not as much as Season 1 but still enjoyed it Just remember seeing a lot of people saying it was bad. Do I just have bad taste?

Reason I put switch in the tags is due to Legoshi Submissive behavior when talking to Haru and his sudden aggressive outburst such as the ones with Bill or Riz.

Also due to me not knowing his last name I went with what I remember seeing when searching up his last name being "Canidae" So apologies if it's incorrect, I also couldn't fit all the Characters so I decided to add only a few such as Jack, Louis, Gohin, and Juno. everyone else I could think of is just a few names such as Els, Bill, Riz (before the reveal) Voss, Collot, Durham, Miguno so Sorry if their species isn't the right one can't control that without it being to many Tokens than it already is.
creator: Rozzapa
